title: RedVox: Safety and Fairness Gaps in Speech Models Across Languages
innovation_summary: RedVox: Safety and Fairness Gaps in Speech Models Across Languages: To address this gap, we introduce RedVox, a multilingual safety and fairness benchmark for audio and speech built on real voices, covering unsafe and unfair stereotypical.
